content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Wonderdog: Senior Full-Stack Engineer — Agentic-First Anywhere in the World 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇨🇦 Canada, and 🇺🇲 United States Minor Outlying Islands California Node.js, PostgreSQL, React, TypeScript, Agentic AI, REST APIs, and Claude.ai Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5677/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Los Angeles <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.wonderdoghealth.com/">https://www.wonderdoghealth.com/</a> </p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Wonder Dog is building an AI-powered preventative health platform for dogs. Small team, fast pace, we ship daily.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">We're looking for a senior full-stack engineer who's all in on an agentic-first workflow. That means you're comfortable letting Claude and Cursor write the bulk of the code while you direct, review, and ship it. You have strong judgment about what good code looks like, you move fast, and you can chug through tickets without hand-holding.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Our stack is React / TypeScript, but how you work matters more than the stack.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">What we're looking for:</p> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Strong grasp of web app architecture</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Comfortable with git and working in a monorepo</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Good communicator who writes clearly</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Experience with API design</li> </ul> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">You don't need to be a CTO. You need to be smart, senior, and get a lot done.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>To apply:</strong> email your resume and a link to your GitHub&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a
